name: splitwiser-root
description: Root workspace to start all Splitwiser services concurrently

scripts.dev: concurrently -c "cyan.bold,green.bold,blue.bold,magenta.bold" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,AA-NODE,ZK-PROVE" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:aa" "npm run start:zkvm"
